quest_first_harvest.name: First Harvest
quest_first_harvest.description: Scavenge scrap metal from the city ruins

start: See those scrap piles in the ruins? Your bots can pick them apart.
Move a bot with arms near a scavenge point. It'll collect automatically.
progress_50: Good, keep going. Every bit of scrap is a piece of something new.
complete: That's enough scrap to start building. Not bad for a first outing.
Here, take this e-waste I found. You'll need it later.

quest_first_cube.name: First Compression
quest_first_cube.description: Fabricate your first component at a powered fabrication unit

start: You have raw materials now. Time to make something useful.
Select a powered fabrication unit and queue up a recipe.
complete: Your first fabrication! The machines remember how to build.
Take this component. Consider it a gift from the old world.

quest_first_craft.name: Arm Assembly
quest_first_craft.description: Fabricate an Arm Assembly to restore broken bots

start: Some of the bots out there have broken arms. They can't scavenge without them.
Fabricate an Arm Assembly. You know the recipe.
complete: Arms ready. Now you can fix those broken bots.
Every repair makes us a little stronger. Here's some scrap for the effort.

quest_build_furnace.name: Power Up
quest_build_furnace.description: Build a lightning rod to generate power

start: The storms here aren't just weather. They're energy.
Build a lightning rod. The taller it is, the more power it pulls from the sky.
progress_50: Almost there. Find a good spot away from the other rods.
complete: Power flows. The grid hums again.
Here's some salvaged electronics. Put them to good use.

quest_build_wall.name: Establish Fabrication
quest_build_wall.description: Build a fabrication unit to manufacture components

start: You need a fabrication unit. It's how you turn raw scrap into real parts.
Place one near a power source. It won't work without juice.
complete: A fabricator online. Now we're in business.
Keep it powered. Keep it running. These parts are a start.

quest_claim_territory.name: Claim Territory
quest_claim_territory.description: Establish your first outpost to secure an area

start: You need to mark your ground. The ferals respect borders... sometimes.
Claim a territory. Build an outpost. Make it yours.
complete: Territory claimed. The ferals will think twice now.
Here are supplies for fortifying your position.

quest_defend_raid.name: Hold the Line
quest_defend_raid.description: Defeat 3 feral machines that wander into your territory

start: The ferals have noticed you. They'll come.
Defend what you've built. Three of them should test your mettle.
progress_50: Keep fighting. They don't stop until they're scrapped.
complete: You held. Impressive, for a newly awakened consciousness.
The cult of EL will be harder. But that's a problem for later.
Take these parts. You've earned them.
